channel.title: 🚀 Ultimate AI Feed - Authority First, Signal Over Noise
channel.description: Top 10 daily: semantic analysis, smart dedup, authority-first, quality over quantity.

item.title: [1] [大V/权威] How to watch Jensen Huang’s Nvidia GTC 2026 keynote
item.description:
📊 Score: 160 | Category: 大V/权威

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • 🏆S-Authority:jensen huang(+100)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • real_release
  • TimeFactor:×0.8

📄 Summary: GTC — which stands for GPU Technology Conference — is Nvidia's flagship annual event, where the chipmaker typically uses the spotlight to announce new products, champion partnerships, and lay out its vision for the future of computing. Huang's keynote will focus on Nvidia's role in the future of com...

item.title: [2] [模型算法] HiAP: A Multi-Granular Stochastic Auto-Pruning Framework for Vision Transformers
item.description:
📊 Score: 140 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L2-Tech:pruning(+25)
  • L3-Tech:transformer(+15)
  • edge_optimization
  • TimeFactor:×0.8

📄 Summary: Vision Transformers require significant computational resources and memory bandwidth, severely limiting their deployment on edge devices. While recent structured pruning methods successfully reduce theoretical FLOPs, they typically operate at a single structural granularity and rely on complex, multi-stage pipelines with post-hoc thresholding to sa...

item.title: [4] [模型算法] One Model, Many Budgets: Elastic Latent Interfaces for Diffusion Transformers
item.description:
📊 Score: 116 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • L3-Tech:diffusion(+15)
  • L3-Tech:transformer(+15)
  • TimeFactor:×0.8

📄 Summary: Diffusion transformers (DiTs) achieve high generative quality but lock FLOPs to image resolution, limiting principled latency-quality trade-offs, and allocate computation uniformly across input spatial tokens, wasting resource allocation to unimportant regions. We introduce Elastic Latent Interface Transformer (ELIT), a drop-in, DiT-compatible mech...

item.title: [8] [模型算法] FlashMotion: Few-Step Controllable Video Generation with Trajectory Guidance
item.description:
📊 Score: 92 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L2-Tech:distillation(+25)
  • L3-Tech:adapter(+15)
  • TimeFactor:×0.8

📄 Summary: Recent advances in trajectory-controllable video generation have achieved remarkable progress. Previous methods mainly use adapter-based architectures for precise motion control along predefined trajectories. However, all these methods rely on a multi-step denoising process, leading to substantial time redundancy and computational overhead. While e...
